testcase.name: Retrieve all accounts returns an array
Create a new checking account
Retrieve an existing account by ID
Retrieve a non-existent account returns 404
Update account status to inactive
Account with balance exceeding limit is flagged
Create account with missing required fields returns 400
Create duplicate account returns 409
List accounts supports pagination
Submit a debit transaction successfully
Submit a credit transaction successfully
Transaction with risk code 999 triggers MANUAL_REVIEW flag
Transaction with unknown account returns 404
Transaction with invalid type returns 400
Retrieve transaction by ID
Retrieve non-existent transaction returns 404
List all transactions for an account
Daily summary reports correct debit and credit totals
Transaction with negative amount returns 400
Check initial migration status before migration starts
testcase.system-out: @upgrade_legacy_databases @app_refactor_decoupling @smoke @migration Scenario: Check initial migration status before migration starts &amp#27;[90m# features/upgrade_legacy_databases.feature:12&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy FINMONOL service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theLegacyServiceIsRunning()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe database migration API is available at &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"/api/migration"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theMigrationApiIsAvailable(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI request the migration status&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iRequestTheMigrationStatus()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseStatusCodeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe migration status is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"NOT_STARTED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theMigrationStatusIs(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"legacySource"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with value &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"flat-files"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsFieldWithValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"targetDatabase"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with value &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"relational"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsFieldWithValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Start database migration from flat files

&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy flat-file data source contains &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m5&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m accounts and &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m10&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m transactions&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.seedLegacyFlatFileData(int,int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI trigger a database migration with payload:&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iTriggerMigration(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)&amp#27;[0m | sourceType | flat-files | | targetType | relational | | batchSize | 100 | | dryRun | false | &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m202&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseStatusCodeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains a field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"migrationId"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsField(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe migration status eventually becomes &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"COMPLETED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theMigrationStatusEventuallyBecomes(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Validate migrated account data integrity
testcase.system-out: @upgrade_legacy_databases @app_refactor_decoupling @migration @validation Scenario: Validate migrated account data integrity &amp#27;[90m# features/upgrade_legacy_databases.feature:32&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy FINMONOL service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theLegacyServiceIsRunning()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe database migration API is available at &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"/api/migration"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theMigrationApiIsAvailable(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma completed migration with id &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"MIG-001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.aCompletedMigrationWithId(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI request validation for migration &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"MIG-001"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iRequestValidationForMigration(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseStatusCodeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe validation result is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"PASSED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theValidationResultIs(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"accountsValidated"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m greater than &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m0&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsFieldGreaterThan(java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"transactionsValidated"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m greater than &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m0&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsFieldGreaterThan(java.lang.String,int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"checksum.accounts"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m matching the source checksum&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsChecksumMatchingSource(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsChecksumMatchingSource(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Reject migration when source data files are missing

features/upgrade_legacy_databases.feature:43&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy FINMONOL service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# payload:&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iTriggerMigration(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)&amp#27;[0m | sourceType | flat-files | | targetType | relational | | dryRun | false | &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m422&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseStatusCodeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"error"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with value &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"SOURCE_NOT_FOUND"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsFieldWithValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsFieldListing(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Dry-run migration reports expected record counts without writing data
testcase.system-out: @upgrade_legacy_databases @app_refactor_decoupling @migration @dry-run Scenario: Dry-run migration reports expected record counts without writing data &amp#27;[90m# features/upgrade_legacy_databases.feature:54&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy FINMONOL service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# transactions&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.seedLegacyFlatFileData(int,int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI trigger a database migration with payload:&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iTriggerMigration(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)&amp#27;[0m | sourceType | flat-files | | targetType | relational | | dryRun | true | &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseStatusCodeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"dryRun"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with value &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"true"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsFieldWithValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field written&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.noDatabaseRecordsAreWritten()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Roll back a failed migration and leave legacy data intact
testcase.system-out: @upgrade_legacy_databases @app_refactor_decoupling @migration @rollback Scenario: Roll back a failed migration and leave legacy data intact &amp#27;[90m# features/upgrade_legacy_databases.feature:67&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy FINMONOL service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theLegacyServiceIsRunning()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe database migration API is available at &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma migration &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"MIG-FAIL"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m that has status &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"FAILED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.aMigrationWithStatus(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI request a rollback for migration &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"MIG-FAIL"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iRequestRollbackForMigration(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseStatusCodeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe migration status for &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"MIG-FAIL"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ROLLED_BACK"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theMigrationStatusForMigrationIs(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy flat-file data source is unchanged&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theLegacyDataSourceIsUnchanged()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Over-limit accounts are correctly migrated and flagged in the database
testcase.system-out: @upgrade_legacy_databases @app_refactor_decoupling @migration @overlimit-accounts Scenario: Over-limit accounts are correctly migrated and flagged in the database &amp#27;[90m# features/upgrade_legacy_databases.feature:75&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy FINMONOL service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy flat-file data source contains an account &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ACC-0001"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with balance &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m50000.00&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and limit &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m10000.00&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.seedAccountWithBalanceAndLimit(java.lang.String,double,double)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI trigger a database migration with payload:&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iTriggerMigration(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)&amp#27;[0m | sourceType | flat-files | | targetType | relational | | dryRun | false | &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe migration status eventually becomes &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"COMPLETED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theMigrationStatusEventuallyBecomes(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI retrieve the account &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ACC-0001"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m from the database&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iRetrieveAccountFromDatabase(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is account field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"balance"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m50000.00&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.AccountStepDefinitions.theAccountFieldIsDouble(java.lang.String,double)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe account field com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.AccountStepDefinitions.theAccountFieldIsDouble(java.lang.String,double)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe account field "&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1moverLimit&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m" is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mtrue&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.AccountStepDefinitions.theAccountFieldIsBoolean(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Transactions with risk code 999 are migrated with MANUAL_REVIEW flag
testcase.system-out: @upgrade_legacy_databases @app_refactor_decoupling @migration @risk-codes Scenario: Transactions with risk code 999 are migrated with MANUAL_REVIEW flag &amp#27;[90m# features/upgrade_legacy_databases.feature:89&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy FINMONOL service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theLegacyServiceIsRunning()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe database migration API is available at &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"/api/migration"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theMigrationApiIsAvailable(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy flat-file data source contains a transaction with code &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"999"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m for account &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ACC-0002"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.seedTransactionWithRiskCode(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI trigger a database migration with payload:&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iTriggerMigration(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)&amp#27;[0m | sourceType | flat-files | | targetType | relational | | dryRun | false | &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe migration status eventually becomes &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"COMPLETED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theMigrationStatusEventuallyBecomes(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI retrieve transactions for account &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ACC-0002"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iRetrieveTransactionsForAccount(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseStatusCodeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mat least one transaction has field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"reviewFlag"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with value &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"MANUAL_REVIEW"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.TransactionStepDefinitions.atLeastOneTransactionHasFieldWithValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Debit and credit totals are preserved after migration
testcase.system-out: @upgrade_legacy_databases @app_refactor_decoupling @migration @debit-credit-totals Scenario: Debit and credit totals are preserved after migration &amp#27;[90m# features/upgrade_legacy_databases.feature:101&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy FINMONOL service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theLegacyServiceIsRunning()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe database migration API is available at &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"/api/migration"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theMigrationApiIsAvailable(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy flat-file data source contains:&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.seedTransactionTable(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)&amp#27;[0m | transactionId | accountId | type | amount | code | | TXN-001 | ACC-0003 | D | 1500.00 | 001 | | TXN-002 | ACC-0003 | C | 500.00 | 002 | | TXN-003 | ACC-0004 | D | 200.00 | 003 | &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI trigger a database migration with payload:&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iTriggerMigration(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)&amp#27;[0m | sourceType | flat-files | | targetType | relational | | dryRun | false | &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe migration status eventually becomes &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"COMPLETED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.theMigrationStatusEventuallyBecomes(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI request the migration summary for the completed migration&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iRequestMigrationSummary()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseStatusCodeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe summary field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"totalDebits"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1700.00&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.TransactionStepDefinitions.theSummaryFieldIsDouble(java.lang.String,double)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe summary field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"totalCredits"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m500.00&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.TransactionStepDefinitions.theSummaryFieldIsDouble(java.lang.String,double)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Re-running migration on already-migrated data is idempotent
testcase.system-out: @upgrade_legacy_databases @app_refactor_decoupling @migration @idempotent Scenario: Re-running migration on already-migrated data is idempotent &amp#27;[90m# features/upgrade_legacy_databases.feature:118&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe legacy FINMONOL service is running&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theLegacyServiceIsRunning()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe database migration API is available at &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"/api/migration"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theMigrationApiIsAvailable(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma completed migration for the current data source&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.aCompletedMigrationForCurrentDataSource()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI trigger a database migration with payload:&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.DatabaseMigrationStepDefinitions.iTriggerMigration(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)&amp#27;[0m | sourceType | flat-files | | targetType | relational | | dryRun | false | &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m409&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseStatusCodeIs(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"error"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with value &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ALREADY_MIGRATED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsFieldWithValue(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response contains field &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"existingMigrationId"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.finmonol.api.tests.steps.CommonStepDefinitions.theResponseContainsFieldWithoutValue(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
